name: CCC Client
description: Installs the ccc-client binary and adds a 'ccc' command to connect to the CCC orchestrator running on the WSL host.

version.description: Release version to install. Use 'latest' or a specific release tag (e.g. 'main-abc1234...').

orch_host.description: Hostname or IP of the CCC orchestrator server. Defaults to 'host.docker.internal' which resolves to the WSL host.

orch_port.description: TCP port the CCC orchestrator listens on.

orch_verbose.description: Enable verbose debug logging on the client.
